records.title: Everything You Need to Know About F-150 Brake Rotors & Pads
records.compatibilityNote: Guide covers 2009-2014 trucks and calls out the 2010-up brake sizing change in the twelfth generation.
buyerNotes: Bigger tires and heavy hauling raise braking demands quickly.
Rotor and pad material choice should reflect heat load, not only appearance.

records.title: Ford F-150 Side Steps & Running Boards: Mistakes to Avoid
records.compatibilityNote: General F-150 guidance that still applies to 2010 crew/super cab fitment decisions.
buyerNotes: Step width, mounting position, and ground-clearance tradeoffs matter more than looks alone.
Do not drill or commit to brackets until future accessory interference is understood.

records.title: Ford F-150 Bed Liners & Bed Mats
records.compatibilityNote: Fitment list explicitly includes 2010 F-150 with the 5.4 V8.
buyerNotes: Drop-in or rubberized liners reduce cargo movement and paint damage.
Drainage and tie-down compatibility matter for working trucks.
